items.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.cn_title: OpenAI获百亿融资 加速AI全球化发展
items.cn_summary: 全球人工智能公司OpenAI宣布获得122亿美元新资金，用于全球AI技术拓展、新一代计算投资，并满足对ChatGPT、Codex及企业AI的增长需求。

items.title: There are more AI health tools than ever—but how well do they work?
items.summary: Earlier this month, Microsoft launched Copilot Health, a new space within its Copilot app where users will be able to connect their medical records and ask specific questions about their health.
items.cn_title: 微软推出健康助手Copilot Health
items.cn_summary: 微软早前在其Copilot应用内推出新功能Copilot Health，用户在此可以连接医疗记录，并就健康问题提出具体查询。

items.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
items.summary: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.
items.cn_title: OpenAI未上市即获30亿美元巨额融资
items.cn_summary: 尽管尚未上市，OpenAI的最新一轮融资已经获得亚马逊、英伟达和软银的领投，估值达到8520亿美元，正接近IPO。

items.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
items.summary: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.
items.cn_summary: 在获得硅谷重量级人物投资、推出不到一年后，基于众包AI模型反馈的初创企业Yupp周二宣布将结束业务。

items.title: Exclusive: Runway launches $10M fund, Builders program to support early-stage AI startups
items.summary: Runway is launching a $10 million fund and startup program to back companies building with its AI video models, as it pushes toward interactive, real-time “video intelligence” applications.
items.cn_title: Runway设立1000万美元基金 助力AI初创企业
items.cn_summary: Runway启动了一个1000万美元的基金和初创企业计划，旨在支持利用公司AI视频模型构建业务的公司，并积极推进交互式、实时的“视频智能”应用。

items.title: Agent-driven development in Copilot Applied Science
items.summary:
I used coding agents to build agents that automated part of my job. Here's what I learned about working better with coding agents.
The post Agent-driven development in Copilot Applied Science appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.cn_title: Copilot技术中的智能代理驱动开发
items.cn_summary: 我利用编码代理自动化工作流程，以下是我掌握的与编码代理协同工作的关键经验。

items.title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub security
items.summary:
Learn how to secure your projects and keep them safe with GitHub Advanced Security.
The post GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub security appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.cn_summary: 掌握如何利用GitHub高级安全功能保护你的项目不被恶意攻击。该教程首先发表在GitHub官方博客上。

items.title: Shifting to AI model customization is an architectural imperative
items.summary: In the early days of large language models (LLMs), we grew accustomed to massive 10x jumps in reasoning and coding capability with every new model iteration. Today, those jumps have flattened into incremental gains.
items.cn_title: 自定义AI模型成为建筑行业新趋势
items.cn_summary: 在大型语言模型（LLMs）初期，每个新模型迭代都能带来10倍的性能提升。如今，这种飞跃式增长已转变为渐进式优化。

items.title: The Pentagon’s culture war tactic against Anthropic has backfired
items.summary: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here.
items.cn_title: 五角大楼对Anthropic的文化战策略适得其反
items.cn_summary: 本周《算法》时事通讯中报道了五角大楼针对Anthropic的文化战策略，其负面效应不容小觑，欲知详情，可订阅关注。

items.title: Alexa+ gets new food ordering experiences with Uber Eats and Grubhub
items.summary: You can now order from Uber Eats and Grubhub using Alexa+, an experience Amazon says will be similar to chatting with a waiter at a restaurant or placing an order at a drive-thru.
items.cn_title: 亚马逊Alexa+联手Uber Eats和Grubhub提供点餐服务
items.cn_summary: 现在，用户可以借助亚马逊Alexa+直接从Uber Eats和Grubhub下单点餐，这种体验类似于餐厅聊天点餐或汽车穿梭餐厅订单。
